class.name: RDShaderReflectionSpecializationConstant
class.brief_description: Specialization constant reflected from SPIR-V bytecode.
class.description: Describes a specialization constant declared by SPIR-V bytecode reflected with [method RenderingDevice.shader_reflect_spirv].

members.member: The specialization constant ID declared by the shader.
The default value declared by the shader.
The reflected constant name, if present in the SPIR-V bytecode.
Bitmask of shader stages that use this specialization constant. Use the [code]RenderingDevice.SHADER_STAGE_*_BIT[/code] constants to test the returned value.
